response: guest i am stefan muller, seeking to join in2code in rosenheim as an apprentice for fachinformatiker für anwendungsentwicklung. guest i have been fascinated by it since childhood and have developed small hobby projects in python. guest i am currently pursuing my economics school leaving certificate and have abandoned both the vocational school and the abitur exam. guest i am eager to learn and contribute to the development of web solutions using typo3. guest i am inspired by the work of florian bröcker and am excited to apply for this position. guest i am open to learning and growing in a professional environment.
